title: Lens composition cannot express edge-traversal rollups — only field-filtered item-set unions
description: The lens `composition` kind (config.schema.json lenses[].members) unions members that are each either a sub-lens reference or a {from, where} field-equality item-filter; resolveComposition (project-context.ts) walks those members and unions the resulting item-sets. There is NO lens construct for walking closure-table edges to assemble a hierarchical/containment rollup (e.g. feature_contains_story then story_contains_task, or phase→task). Surfaced in unit 2.2 (DEC-0037 packaged conception, commits b8a9d7e B0 / a4c5257 B4): the intended `work-rollup` starter lens (feature→story→task containment projection) could not be authored because the composition shape cannot express edge-traversal and lenses[] had zero precedent to validate an edge-rollup shape against. Shipped the 2 field-derived status lenses (tasks-by-status, gaps-by-status) and deferred work-rollup. Note: the edge-traversal PRIMITIVES already exist (walkDescendants / edgesForLens / walkLensDescendants in project-context.ts + lens-view.ts) — the gap is that the lens-SPEC has no construct that consumes them for rollup projection. Intended outcome: a lens construct expressing edge-traversal rollups (walk one or more relation_types to a max_depth; nest/group items by the traversal), so containment hierarchies become first-class lens projections — completing DEC-0037 starter-lens coverage for composite/rollup kinds.

evidence.reference: lenses[] composition members = sub-lens ref OR {from, where} field-equality filter; no edge-traversal/relation_type-walk member shape
resolveComposition unions field-filtered member item-sets; walkDescendants/edgesForLens edge-traversal primitives exist but are not consumable from a lens spec for rollup projection
lenses[] ships 2 field-derived status lenses; work-rollup edge-traversal lens absent (deferred at unit 2.2 B0)

DEC-0037 (each sample packaged with a starter lens) — incomplete for composite/rollup kinds without an edge-traversal lens construct; DEC-0013 (relations are edges — the surface a rollup lens would traverse)

impact: Containment/rollup projections — the dominant show-a-feature's-full-work-tree and show-a-phase's-tasks views — are not expressible as lenses. DEC-0037 starter-lens coverage is field-derived-only; composite kinds (feature/phase) get no rollup projection. Blocks authoring the work-rollup sample lens.
proposed_resolution: Add a lens construct that expresses edge-traversal rollups (walk declared relation_type(s) to a max_depth from a root block, nesting/grouping items by the traversal), backed by the existing walkDescendants/edgesForLens primitives. Implementation specifics intentionally NOT prescribed (outcome-only); the implementer should survey the existing closure-table traversal surface (project-context.ts walkDescendants/edgesForLens, lens-view.ts walkLensDescendants) + reuse them rather than add a parallel traversal. Once landed, author the deferred work-rollup sample lens (feature_contains_story → story_contains_task) in samples/conception.json.
